long_description:
NRE were alerted of link issues between cbs01.od01.sao03 xe-3/0/12:0 <-> cbs02.tl01.nyc01 xe-0/0/24:1. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19593
short_description: cbs02.tl01.nyc01 -- cbs01.od01.sao03; cbs01.eq02.sao02 -- cbs02.tm01.mia01 Globenet circuits flapped
